queries.question: What facility type is common for all bank branches?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.FacilityType  from Bank_Branch_Facilities join Facilities on Bank_Branch_Facilities.FacilityID = Facilities.FacilityID join Bank_Branch on Bank_Branch_Facilities.BranchID = Bank_Branch.BranchID   GROUP BY Bank_Branch_Facilities.FacilityID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Branch_Facilities.BranchID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Branch)

queries.question: Show me the facility type available at each bank branch.
queries.sql: select bank_branch.branchname , facilities.facilitytype from Bank_Branch_Facilities join Facilities on Bank_Branch_Facilities.FacilityID = Facilities.FacilityID join Bank_Branch on Bank_Branch_Facilities.BranchID = Bank_Branch.BranchID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?branchname ?facilitytype WHERE {
  ?bank_branch_facilities a :Bank_Branch_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facilities .
  ?bank_branch_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?bank_branch a :Branches .
  ?bank_branch_facilities p:hasBank_Branch ?bank_branch .
  ?bank_branch p:BranchName ?branchname .
  ?facilities p:FacilityType ?facilitytype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the facility type available at each bank branch.
